posts.cookedHtml:
Apps

  • Breaking changes: Sandboxing for all iframes
    • Date TBD
  • Updates to seat-based view apps and trial subscriptions starting August 28th (marketplace only)

API

  • Breaking changes: API version 2023-10
    • January 1st, 2024 API release postponed to January 15th
    • Breaking change: Removed the deprecated `items` field on groups queries, replaced with `items_page`
